author: driver--comprehensive-readme-and-quarto-docs-src-documentation
content: Decision: Created 4 new guide pages (swarm.qmd, knowledge.qmd, tui.qmd, container-agents.qmd) as standalone guides rather than expanding existing pages -- each feature is distinct enough to warrant its own page. Updated _quarto.yml, index.qmd, commands.qmd, multi-agent.qmd, hooks.qmd, hook-config.qmd, quickstart.qmd, and README.md with cross-references and expanded content.
